_comment: Adopted CAT-5 R9 exact opponent mix (75/10/5/5/5), CAT-54 production template. Point "registry" at a real CAT-9 ChampionRegistry JSON (tools/champion_registry.py) before use -- registry_role/registry_pool categories below resolve against it via tools/opponent_mix_registry.py:resolve_opponent_mix_manifest. catanatron_value is marked pending until CAT-56 ('Exploiter lane: catanatron_value/AB3 as in-generator opponents') wires a real evaluator for it; until then this mix's effective (renormalized) ratios are 75/10/5/5 over the four checkpoint-backed categories.
